market_brief.summary_en: Constructive risk regime (68.5/100) holds with VIX at 16.53 while QQQ distribution days hit 6 (DANGER) and market sentiment remains fearful.
key_themes_en: QQQ distribution days at 6 signal distribution risk
market_brief.watch_points_en: QQQ at 6 distribution days (DANGER) and MU earnings on 2026-06-24

symbol_briefs.brief_en: TSM closed at $423.93 with pre-market at $438.10. All EMAs above price with EMA200 rising and GC intact near 52-week high. Strong May revenue growth of 30% YoY driven by AI demand and leading-edge capacity constraints supports the setup.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: TSM은 $423.93에 마감하고 프리마켓 $438.10. 모든 이평선 위에 EMA200 상승 중이며 GC 유지. 5월 매출 30% YoY AI 수요와 선단 공정 제약이 상승 동력.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: NVDA closed at $205.19 with pre-market at $207.99. Price below EMAs but EMA200 rising and volume contraction suggests energy accumulation near 52-week high. Strong AI revenue growth and derated valuation viewed as attractive mispricing.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: NVDA는 $205.19에 마감하고 프리마켓 $207.99. 이평선 아래이나 EMA200 상승 중이며 거래량 수축으로 에너지 축적. AI 매출 성장에 저평가 매수 기회로 인식.
symbol_briefs.key_risk_en: Failure to reclaim EMA21 $211.03 keeps distribution structure
symbol_briefs.key_risk_ko: EMA21 $211.03 회복 실패 시 분배 구조 유지
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: Reclaim above EMA21 $211.03 for Stage2 continuation
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_ko: EMA21 $211.03 상회 시 Stage2 연장 가능

symbol_briefs.brief_en: META closed at $566.98 with pre-market at $576.20. Price below all EMAs in DOWNTREND monthly structure despite optimistic social score. Investors view strong ad revenue growth and AI initiatives as undervalued relative to capex concerns.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: META는 $566.98에 마감하고 프리마켓 $576.20. 모든 이평선 아래 월봉 다운트렌드. 광고 매출 성장 및 AI 이니셔티브를 capex 우려 대비 저평가로 평가.
symbol_briefs.key_risk_en: EMA200 $639.67 resistance remains distant in downtrend
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: Stabilization above EMA50 $613.84 needed before considering longs
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_ko: EMA50 $613.84 상회 안정 후 롱 고려

symbol_briefs.brief_en: TSLA closed at $406.43 with pre-market at $412.25. Price below EMAs in DISTRIBUTION structure with EMA200 rising. FSD 14.3.4 rollout and SpaceX IPO halo generating positive buzz.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: TSLA는 $406.43에 마감하고 프리마켓 $412.25. 이평선 아래 분배 구조이나 EMA200 상승 중. FSD 14.3.4 출시와 SpaceX IPO 기대감 긍정적.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: PLTR closed at $127.99 with pre-market at $130.08. Price below all EMAs in low RS 0.0 UPTREND with volume contraction. Strong revenue growth, raised FY26 guidance, and AIP momentum viewed as buying opportunity in pullback by long-term holders.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: PLTR은 $127.99에 마감하고 프리마켓 $130.08. 모든 이평선 아래 RS 0.0. 매출 성장과 FY26 가이던스 상향, AIP 모멘텀을 눌림목 매수 기회로 인식.
symbol_briefs.key_risk_en: EMA200 $146.71 resistance and RS 0.0 signal weak momentum
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: Break above EMA21 $137.68 required to improve structure

symbol_briefs.brief_en: MU closed at $981.61 with pre-market at $1,057.00. All EMAs above price with EMA200 rising and GC intact near 52-week high. Bullish views on HBM sold-out status and AI memory contracts providing strong revenue visibility ahead of June 24 earnings.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: MU는 $981.61에 마감하고 프리마켓 $1,057.00. 모든 이평선 위 EMA200 상승 GC 유지. HBM 완판과 AI 메모리 계약으로 6월 24일 실적 전 매출 가시성 확보.
symbol_briefs.key_risk_en: RSI decline divergence noted despite strong RS 100.0
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: Sustained move above $1,089.47 52-week high targets extension
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_ko: $1,089.47 52주 고점 상회 지속 시 추세 확장

symbol_briefs.brief_en: CRWD closed at $682.80 with pre-market at $692.00. All EMAs above price with EMA200 rising and GC intact near 52-week high with volume contraction. Posts highlight CrowdStrike threat reports and CEO George Kurtz's Le Mans racing success praised by Jim Cramer.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: CRWD는 $682.80에 마감하고 프리마켓 $692.00. 모든 이평선 위 EMA200 상승 GC 유지 거래량 수축. CrowdStrike 위협 보고서와 Kurtz CEO 르망 레이싱 성과 언급.
symbol_briefs.key_risk_en: RSI decline divergence flagged near 52-week high

symbol_briefs.brief_en: AMZN closed at $238.55 with pre-market at $243.75. Price below EMAs in DISTRIBUTION structure with EMA200 rising. Strong Q1 results with AWS +28% YoY and AI infrastructure momentum make many see AMZN as undervalued.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: AMZN은 $238.55에 마감하고 프리마켓 $243.75. 이평선 아래 분배 구조이나 EMA200 상승. AWS +28% YoY와 AI 인프라 모멘텀으로 저평가 인식.
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: Reclaim above EMA50 $250.61 for structure improvement

symbol_briefs.brief_en: MSFT closed at $390.74 with pre-market at $396.25. Price below all EMAs in DOWNTREND monthly with fearful social sentiment. Short-term frustration with recent price decline, Xbox hardware losses, and high AI capex pressuring margins.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: MSFT는 $390.74에 마감하고 프리마켓 $396.25. 모든 이평선 아래 월봉 다운트렌드 fearful 심리. 최근 하락과 Xbox 손실, 높은 AI capex로 마진 압박.
symbol_briefs.key_risk_en: EMA200 $433.55 far above current price in downtrend
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: Stabilization above EMA50 $413.20 first step to repair
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_ko: EMA50 $413.20 상회 안정이 회복 첫 단계

symbol_briefs.brief_en: AAPL closed at $291.13 with pre-market at $293.16. Price below EMAs in DISTRIBUTION structure with EMA200 rising. Mixed discussion on high valuation and post-WWDC pullback offset by excitement over potential foldable iPhone launch.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: AAPL은 $291.13에 마감하고 프리마켓 $293.16. 이평선 아래 분배 구조이나 EMA200 상승. 고평가와 WWDC 후 하락 논의와 폴더블 아이폰 기대 혼재.
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: Sustained hold above EMA50 $289.06 for base building

symbol_briefs.brief_en: GOOGL closed at $359.68 with pre-market at $365.33. Price below EMAs but EMA200 rising with GC retest and volume contraction near 52-week high. Strong AI backlog growth to $467.6B and reasonable Mag7 valuation with AI momentum in search/cloud.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: GOOGL은 $359.68에 마감하고 프리마켓 $365.33. 이평선 아래이나 EMA200 상승 GC 재시험 거래량 수축. AI 백로그 $467.6B와 Mag7 합리적 밸류에이션.
symbol_briefs.key_risk_en: EMA21 $370.02 resistance must be reclaimed for upside
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: Break above EMA21 $370.02 targets 52-week high retest
